title: oncidium suaveolens var. pumilum
intro: Oncidium suaveolens var. pumilum is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and it has been used to treat various ailments including bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas or infusions, and it has also been used in traditional remedies in the form of tinctures or extracts.
